examples: he was ordained in the Church

meanings.definition: give entirely to a specific person, activity, or cause
examples: She committed herself to the work of God
give one's talents to a good cause
consecrate your life to the church

meanings.definition: dedicate to a deity by a vow
render holy by means of religious rites
solemnly dedicated to or set apart for a high purpose
examples: a chapel dedicated to the dead of World War II
